UNDERSTAND0: First, we would like you to verify that you understand the six basic emotions involved in this test.  Please give a brief answer for each question.  Click OK to continue
UNDERSTAND2: Can you tell me one situation where/when you felt <EMOTION>? Hit ENTER when done.
UNDERSTAND3: Can you show this feeling <EMOTION> on your face?
UNDERSTAND4: There might be times when one doesn't feel any particular emotion. This state is called neutral
PRACTICE1: Let us see if you understood what we discussed. I will show you one picture on the screen. It will have 6 emotion words below. You must identify the expression and pick the right word that matches. Press the space bar to try some practice images.
TEST1: This task has 70 images that comprise 10 images for 6 basic emotions (Fear, Disgust, Surprise, Sad, Happy and Angry) and 10 images for neutral. Press the space bar to begin.
FASTER: Your responses are too slow. Don't spend too much time thinking about the response.
PAUSE: Take a short break. Press the space bar to continue
DEBRIEF: Thank you for participating in the study.  Alert the researcher that you are done. Press any key to continue.
